The '''''Anterab''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during [[Arms Race|the "Arms Race"]]. The ''Anterab'' and the ''[[Degathem]]'' were delivering supplies critical for
the development of the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. Despite
[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attempts to end the phase by raiding the
Imperial research station, both freighters completed their mission and
delivered the supplies, thanks to an escort of four assault gunboats led by imperial pilot Maarek Stele.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
